# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

properties([
    parameters([
        string(name: 'BUILD_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No build command specified"', description: 'Custom build command to execute'),
        string(name: 'TEST_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No test command specified"', description: 'Custom test command to execute'),
        string(name: 'DEPLOYMENT_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No deployment command specified"', description: 'Custom deployment command to execute'),
        text(name: 'PRE_BUILD_SCRIPT', defaultValue: '', description: 'Multi-line pre-build script'),
        text(name: 'POST_BUILD_SCRIPT', defaultValue: '', description: 'Multi-line post-build script'),
        string(name: 'WORKING_DIRECTORY', defaultValue: '.', description: 'Working directory for commands'),
        choice(name: 'SHELL_TYPE', choices: ['bash', 'sh', 'zsh'], description: 'Shell interpreter to use'),
        booleanParam(name: 'SKIP_TESTS', defaultValue: false, description: 'Skip test execution'),
        booleanParam(name: 'SKIP_DEPLOYMENT', defaultValue: false, description: 'Skip deployment step'),
        booleanParam(name: 'VERBOSE_OUTPUT', defaultValue: true, description: 'Enable verbose output'),
        string(name: 'ENVIRONMENT_VARS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Environment variables (KEY=VALUE,KEY2=VALUE2)'),
        string(name: 'BUILD_TIMEOUT', defaultValue: '60', description: 'Build timeout in minutes'),
        string(name: 'CLEANUP_COMMAND', defaultValue: '', description: 'Cleanup command to run after pipeline'),
        booleanParam(name: 'CONTINUE_ON_ERROR', defaultValue: false, description: 'Continue pipeline on command failure'),
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_PATH', defaultValue: '', description: 'Path to artifacts to archive'),
        string(name: 'NOTIFICATION_EMAIL', defaultValue: '', description: 'Email address for notifications')
    ])
])

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    options {
        timestamps()
        timeout(time: params.BUILD_TIMEOUT.toInteger(), unit: 'MINUTES')
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '10'))
    }
    
    environment {
        WORKSPACE_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}"
        BUILD_ID = "${env.BUILD_ID}"
        BUILD_NUMBER = "${env.BUILD_NUMBER}"
        JOB_NAME = "${env.JOB_NAME}"
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Initialize') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "================================================"
                    echo "Starting Custom Pipeline Execution"
                    echo "Build Number: ${BUILD_NUMBER}"
                    echo "Job Name: ${JOB_NAME}"
                    echo "Working Directory: ${params.WORKING_DIRECTORY}"
                    echo "Shell Type: ${params.SHELL_TYPE}"
                    echo "================================================"
                    
                    if (params.ENVIRONMENT_VARS) {
                        echo "Setting custom environment variables..."
                        def envVars = params.ENVIRONMENT_VARS.split(',')
                        envVars.each { envVar ->
                            def parts = envVar.split('=', 2)
                            if (parts.size() == 2) {
                                env."${parts[0].trim()}" = parts[1].trim()
                                if (params.VERBOSE_OUTPUT) {
                                    echo "Set ${parts[0].trim()} = ${parts[1].trim()}"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    
                    currentBuild.description = "Build: ${params.BUILD_COMMAND.take(50)}"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Pre-Build') {
            when {
                expression { params.PRE_BUILD_SCRIPT && params.PRE_BUILD_SCRIPT.trim() != '' }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Executing Pre-Build Script..."
                    dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY) {
                        executeCommand(params.PRE_BUILD_SCRIPT, 'Pre-Build')
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Executing Build Command..."
                    dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY) {
                        executeCommand(params.BUILD_COMMAND, 'Build')
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Test') {
            when {
                expression { !params.SKIP_TESTS }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Executing Test Command..."
                    dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY) {
                        executeCommand(params.TEST_COMMAND, 'Test')
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy') {
            when {
                expression { !params.SKIP_DEPLOYMENT }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Executing Deployment Command..."
                    dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY) {
                        executeCommand(params.DEPLOYMENT_COMMAND, 'Deploy')
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Post-Build') {
            when {
                expression { params.POST_BUILD_SCRIPT && params.POST_BUILD_SCRIPT.trim() != '' }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Executing Post-Build Script..."
                    dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY) {
                        executeCommand(params.POST_BUILD_SCRIPT, 'Post-Build')
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Archive Artifacts') {
            when {
                expression { params.ARTIFACT_PATH && params.ARTIFACT_PATH.trim() != '' }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Archiving artifacts from: ${params.ARTIFACT_PATH}"
                    try {
                        archiveArtifacts artifacts: params.ARTIFACT_PATH, allowEmptyArchive: true
                    } catch (Exception e) {
                        echo "Warning: Failed to archive artifacts - ${e.message}"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    post {
        always {
            script {
                echo "================================================"
                echo "Pipeline Execution Completed"
                echo "Status: ${currentBuild.result ?: 'SUCCESS'}"
                echo "================================================"
                
                if (params.CLEANUP_COMMAND && params.CLEANUP_COMMAND.trim() != '') {
                    echo "Executing cleanup command..."
                    try {
                        dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY) {
                            executeCommand(params.CLEANUP_COMMAND, 'Cleanup')
                        }
                    } catch (Exception e) {
                        echo "Warning: Cleanup command failed - ${e.message}"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        success {
            script {
                echo "Build completed successfully!"
                if (params.NOTIFICATION_EMAIL) {
                    sendNotification('SUCCESS')
                }
            }
        }
        failure {
            script {
                echo "Build failed!"
                if (params.NOTIFICATION_EMAIL) {
                    sendNotification('FAILURE')
                }
            }
        }
        unstable {
            script {
                echo "Build is unstable!"
                if (params.NOTIFICATION_EMAIL) {
                    sendNotification('UNSTABLE')
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

def executeCommand(String command, String stageName) {
    if (!command || command.trim() == '') {
        echo "No command specified for ${stageName} stage"
        return
    }
    
    def shellExecutable = getShellExecutable()
    def verboseFlag = params.VERBOSE_OUTPUT ? 'set -x' : ''
    
    def fullCommand = """
${verboseFlag}
${command}
"""
    
    try {
        if (params.SHELL_TYPE == 'bash') {
            sh(script: fullCommand, returnStatus: false)
        } else if (params.SHELL_TYPE == 'zsh') {
            sh(script: "#!/bin/zsh\n${fullCommand}", returnStatus: false)
        } else {
            sh(script: fullCommand, returnStatus: false)
        }
        
        echo "${stageName} stage completed successfully"
    } catch (Exception e) {
        if (params.CONTINUE_ON_ERROR) {
            echo "Warning: ${stageName} stage failed but continuing - ${e.message}"
            currentBuild.result = 'UNSTABLE'
        } else {
            echo "Error: ${stageName} stage failed - ${e.message}"
            throw e
        }
    }
}

def getShellExecutable() {
    switch(params.SHELL_TYPE) {
        case 'bash':
            return '/bin/bash'
        case 'zsh':
            return '/bin/zsh'
        default:
            return '/bin/sh'
    }
}

def sendNotification(String status) {
    try {
        def subject = "${status}: ${env.JOB_NAME} - Build #${env.BUILD_NUMBER}"
        def body = """
Pipeline Execution ${status}

Job: ${env.JOB_NAME}
Build Number: ${env.BUILD_NUMBER}
Build URL: ${env.BUILD_URL}
Status: ${status}

Build Parameters:
- Build Command: ${params.BUILD_COMMAND}
- Test Command: ${params.TEST_COMMAND}
- Deployment Command: ${params.DEPLOYMENT_COMMAND}
- Skip Tests: ${params.SKIP_TESTS}
- Skip Deployment: ${params.SKIP_DEPLOYMENT}

Duration: ${currentBuild.durationString}
"""
        
        emailext(
            to: params.NOTIFICATION_EMAIL,
            subject: subject,
            body: body,
            mimeType: 'text/plain'
        )
    } catch (Exception e) {
        echo "Failed to send email notification: ${e.message}"
    }
}
